description_long: This object appears as a perfectly smooth, featureless black sphere with a subtle, soft highlight at its center, suggesting a highly uniform and polished surface. There are no visible edges, seams, or transitions that would indicate the presence of a blade, handle, or any other component typical of a knife or sword. The surface is consistently dark, with a slight gradient toward the center due to lighting, but no textural or structural details are discernible. The object lacks any visible ornamentation, engravings, or markings. Its form is entirely symmetrical and geometric, with no indication of a cutting edge, point, or ergonomic grip. The overall impression is of a solid, dense, and monolithic object, more akin to a decorative orb than a functional blade.
description: A perfectly smooth, featureless black sphere with a subtle central highlight and no visible blade or handle features.
description_view_0: A uniformly black, glossy sphere with a faint central highlight and no discernible features.
description_view_1: Identical to view 0, showing a smooth, unbroken black surface with a soft highlight.
description_view_2: The sphere remains featureless and glossy, with lighting creating a subtle gradient at the center.
description_view_3: No new features; the black sphere is smooth and symmetrical from this angle as well.
